properties.name: Levels of Scale
properties.assessment: Multi-layer architecture (macro integration → meso centers → micro parameters). Memory hooks add scale depth.

properties.name: Strong Centres
properties.assessment: 8 core centers + 3 extension centers. All centers now fully active with repaired event/hook bridges.

properties.name: Boundaries
properties.assessment: PluginBase ABC, HookPoint enum, API route registration. Boundaries respected via proper event routing.

properties.name: Alternating Repetition
properties.assessment: Echobeats 4-phase, per-tick plugin dispatch, event emit/subscribe, 20-point hook apply chain fully realized.

properties.name: Positive Space
properties.assessment: All 20 hook points now actively injected into the integration hub pipeline. Dead code space eliminated.

properties.name: Good Shape
properties.assessment: AU targets decay properly (no sticky drift). MLGamer tactic state updates cleanly. Good shape restored.

properties.name: Local Symmetries
properties.assessment: EventBus on/off, HookSystem add/remove, Plugin enable/disable — symmetric lifecycle pairs.

properties.name: Deep Interlock
properties.assessment: CRITICAL FIX: PluginRegistry now subscribed to EventBus. Endocrine callback emits events. Deep interlock achieved.

properties.name: Contrast
properties.assessment: Core vs Extensions contrast maintained. Accurate event emission counting improves metric contrast.

properties.name: Gradients
properties.assessment: Priority gradients in EventBus/HookSystem. Tactic state transitions smoothly with Q-learning updates.

properties.name: Roughness
properties.assessment: Lorenz chaos, stochastic exploration, emergent plugin interactions. Chaos scales gracefully.

properties.name: Echoes
properties.assessment: Plugin lifecycle echoes center lifecycle. Memory store/recall echoes through new architectural hooks.

properties.name: The Void
properties.assessment: The 20 hook points are now actually traversed, providing true functional voids for plugins to inhabit.

properties.name: Simplicity and Inner Calm
properties.assessment: Removed sticky AU state complexity. Unified event routing simplifies mental model of the pipeline.

properties.name: Not-Separateness
properties.assessment: Plugins now receive ALL world/endocrine events via the repaired bridge. True wholeness realized.

weakest.name: Roughness
weakest.assessment: Lorenz chaos, stochastic exploration, emergent plugin interactions. Chaos scales gracefully.

strongest.name: Strong Centres
strongest.assessment: 8 core centers + 3 extension centers. All centers now fully active with repaired event/hook bridges.

biggest_improvement.name: The Void
biggest_improvement.assessment: The 20 hook points are now actually traversed, providing true functional voids for plugins to inhabit.
